"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\SDL3_mixer-shared.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\SDL3_mixer-shared.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\SDL3_mixer-shared.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\gcc.exe -shared -static-libgcc -Wl,--version-script=C:/Users/Admin/Documents/Cosmos/vendors/SDL_mixer/src/SDL_mixer.sym -Wl,--no-undefined -o SDL3_mixer.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libSDL3_mixer.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,3 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\SDL3_mixer-shared.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\SDL3_mixer-shared.dir\linkLibs.rsp
